issues.description: Condition missing: 'opponent has more DON!! cards on their field than you' must be encoded as a condition (likely a custom comparison or HasAttachedDon comparison), not 'Always'

SearchDeck action incomplete: does not specify 'look at 5 cards from top' (depth/limit), does not specify card type filter (should be type:HeartPirates or equivalent), does not handle 'reveal up to 1' (quantity limit), and missing action to 'place rest at bottom of deck in any order'
Missing second action: placing non-selected cards at bottom of deck. Current DSL only adds 1 card to hand; the full effect requires managing the remaining 4 cards.
